system.description:
Show them what it means to mess with someone not their own size.

LEVEL 3

Blood of the Titan. You grow one size category while Raging (up to Large). You can move freely through spaces with creatures smaller than you. You become able to Grapple creatures within Reach 2 while Raging.

Crushing Grip. Enemies have disadvantage against avoiding and escaping your Grapple, and Grappled enemies suffer Bludgeoning damage equal to the value of your Fury Dice at the end of their turn.

LEVEL 7

Titanic Toss. Action: Expend a Fury Die to throw a creature you are Grappling up to STR spaces, plus one space for each size category that creature is smaller than you.

LEVEL 11

Mighty Grasp. When you attempt to Grapple an enemy, as part of the same action, you may also attempt to Grapple as many other enemies within Reach as you have free hands.

Skull Rattler. Action: Knock two Grappled creatures together dealing LVL Bludgeoning damage to both and inflicting Dazed.

LEVEL 15

Enormous Potential. You now grow two size categories while Raging (up to Huge), and your Fury Dice grow one step larger (d20 at level 17).
